      void onDeviceInfoReceived(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.DeviceInfo deviceInfo, java.util.List<com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork> candidateNetworks)

    • Method Detail

      • onDeviceInfoReceived

        void onDeviceInfoReceived(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.DeviceInfo deviceInfo,
                          java.util.List<com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork> candidateNetworks)
        Will be called when device info will be received.
        Parameters:
        deviceInfo - Contains device id, public key, account id and a custom string.
        candidateNetworks - List of visible networks.
